applicationRequirements.title: Application Requirements
applicationRequirements.description: Complete list of requirements for Danish citizenship

danishNationalityExam.title: Danish Nationality Exam
danishNationalityExam.description: Official examination for Danish citizenship applicants

danishLanguageExam.title: Danish Language Exam
danishLanguageExam.description: Proof of Danish language proficiency required for integration

danishNationalityExam.title: Danish Nationality Exam
danishNationalityExam.content: The Danish Nationality Exam, officially known as the Danish Citizenship Test, assesses your knowledge of Danish culture, history, society, and values. This examination is a crucial step in your path to becoming a Danish citizen.

danishLanguageExam.title: Danish Language Exam
danishLanguageExam.content: The Danish Language Exam evaluates your proficiency in reading, writing, listening, and speaking Danish. It's a requirement for demonstrating integration competency and is often required for citizenship applications.
danishLanguageExam.duration: Duration: 3-4 hours depending on the level
danishLanguageExam.passingScore: Passing score: Minimum B1 level typically required

naturalizationApplication.title: Naturalization Application
naturalizationApplication.content: The naturalization process allows you to formally apply for Danish citizenship. This is the final step after meeting all requirements including language proficiency and citizenship test.
naturalizationApplication.requiredDocuments: Required documents: Passport, language certificate, citizenship test proof
naturalizationApplication.submitTo: Submit applications to: The Danish Immigration Service

messages.failure: This is what quizzes are for! Keep practicing!

applicationRequirementsTitles.declarationOfAllegiance: You Must Sign a Declaration of Allegiance and Loyalty
applicationRequirementsTitles.permanentResidencePermit: You Must Have a Permanent Residence Permit
